hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl tracking-tight leading-tight font-serif text-[#2C2C2A]
hierarchy.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl tracking-tight leading-snug font-serif text-[#2C2C2A]

buttons.primary: bg-[#D9A098] text-white hover:bg-[#C48A7E] rounded-full px-8 py-4 transition-all duration-300 font-medium tracking-wide shadow-sm hover:shadow-md
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#9EAB9A] text-[#5C5A56] hover:bg-[#9EAB9A] hover:text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 transition-all duration-300 font-medium tracking-wide

cards.service: bg-white rounded-3xl p-8 lg:p-10 border border-[#E8E2D9] shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(44,44,42,0.04)] hover:shadow-[0_16px_48px_rgba(217,160,152,0.15)] hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300 flex flex-col items-start

header.style: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FAF8F5]/80 border-b border-[#E8E2D9]/50 sticky top-0 z-50 transition-all duration-300

logo.note: Since the logo is white, apply CSS filter (invert(1) brightness(0.2)) for light backgrounds like the header, or place it on a dark background in the footer.

hero.description: Portrait of Sophie Lamour. Use in the hero section. Apply a soft arched mask or rounded-3xl corners to fit the feminine theme.

about_portrait.description: Woman drinking tea - serene mood setter for the Qui Suis-je section.

services_context.description: Elegant cozy office - contextual image for home organising or professional coaching.

home.hero: Asymmetric layout: Left text block (H1 + subtitle + dual buttons). Right image block (Sophie's portrait) with an abstract decorative shape or soft rounded corners.
home.services: 6 bento grid cards: Personnel, Professionnel, Parentalité, Home Organising, Ikigai, Art-Thérapie. Use lucide-react icons in soft sage green.
home.testimonials: Use Embla Carousel or Shadcn Carousel. Soft sage green background section (`bg-[#9EAB9A]/10`). Large elegant quote marks in Playfair Display.
home.blog_preview: 3-column grid of recent blog posts. Minimal cards: image, date, title, 'Lire la suite' link.
home.social_feed: Grid of 4 squares for Instagram placeholders. Subtle hover zoom effect.
home.appointment_cta: Full width banner with dusty rose background (`bg-[#D9A098]`), white text, and white button linking to Rendez-vous page.

about.story: Split layout: Text on left, image overlapping right. Very generous spacing.
about.timeline: Vertical timeline of certifications using subtle borders and sage green dots.

services_hub.layout: Individual sections or pages for the 6 services. Use alternating left/right layout (Text/Image) for visual rhythm.

blog.admin: Simple admin dashboard at `/admin`. Password protected (mock login). Table listing posts with edit/delete buttons, and a 'New Post' button.
blog.public: Grid layout. Simple, clean, focus on typography and readability.

testimonials_admin.admin: Section in `/admin` to add/edit client testimonials.

booking.calendly: Embed Calendly widget in a centered container with `rounded-3xl` and `shadow-ambient` to blend with the soft site aesthetic.

contact.form: Custom styled Shadcn form components. Rounded inputs (`rounded-xl`), floating labels, or clean placeholders. Dusty rose submit button.

language_toggle.style: Minimal text toggle (FR / EN) in the header. Use bold weight for active language, light weight for inactive.

motion.hover: Smooth scale up (`scale-105`) for images, `translate-y-1` for cards. `transition-all duration-300 ease-out`.
motion.reveal: Use `framer-motion` for simple fade-in-up on scroll for major sections to make the experience feel premium and calm.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install `framer-motion` for page transitions and scroll reveals.
Use Tailwind arbitrary values for exact brand colors (e.g., `text-[#2C2C2A]`). DO NOT use default blue/purple colors.
The provided logo is white. On the light header, you MUST apply a CSS filter (`filter: invert(1) brightness(0.2)`) to make it visible. On the dark footer, use it as is.
Ensure all interactive elements have `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid='book-appointment-btn'`).
For the 6 services cards, map them exactly to: Personnel, Professionnel, Parentalité, Home Organising, Ikigai, Art-Thérapie.
Build a fully functioning frontend with a mock backend/state for the `/admin` area to manage blog posts and testimonials (can use localStorage or simple state for MVP).
Implement a language context (React Context) for the FR/EN toggle. Default to FR.
